2604.27462.title: Improving Graph Few-shot Learning with Hyperbolic Space and Denoising Diffusion
2604.27462.paper_summary: Graph few-shot learning, which focuses on effectively learning from only a small number of labeled nodes to quickly adapt to new tasks, has garnered significant research attention. Despite recent advances in graph few-shot learning that have demonstrated promising performance, existing methods still suffer from several key limitations. First, during the meta-training phase, these methods typically perform node representation learning in Euclidean space, which often fails to capture the inherently hierarchical structure existing in real-world graph data. Second, during the meta-testing phase, they usually fit an empirical target distribution derived from only a few support samples, even when this distribution significantly deviates from the true underlying distribution. To address these issues, we propose IMPRESS, a novel framework that IMproves graPh few-shot learning with hypeRbolic spacE and denoiSing diffuSion. Specifically, our model learns node representations in a hyperbolic space and enriches the support distribution through denoising diffusion mechanisms. Theoretically, IMPRESS achieves a tighter generalization bound. Empirically, IMPRESS consistently outperforms competitive baselines across multiple benchmark datasets.
2604.27462.paper_summary_zh: 圖形少樣本學習專注於僅從少量標記節點中有效學習，以快速適應新任務，已引起了顯著的研究關注。儘管最近在圖形少樣本學習方面的進展顯示出有前景的表現，但現有方法仍然存在幾個主要限制。首先，在元訓練階段，這些方法通常在歐幾里得空間中執行節點表示學習，這往往無法捕捉現實世界圖形數據中固有的層次結構。其次，在元測試階段，它們通常僅從少數支持樣本中擬合一個實證目標分佈，即使這個分佈與真實的潛在分佈有顯著偏差。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了IMPRESS，一個新穎的框架，通過超曲面空間和去噪擴散來改善圖形少樣本學習。具體而言，我們的模型在超曲面空間中學習節點表示，並通過去噪擴散機制豐富支持分佈。在理論上，IMPRESS實現了更緊的泛化界限。在實證上，IMPRESS在多個基準數據集上始終超越競爭基準。
2604.27462.author: Yonghao Liu et.al.
2604.27462.authors: Yonghao Liu, Jialu Sun, Wei Pang, Fausto Giunchiglia, Ximing Li, Xiaoyue Feng, Renchu Guan
